scripts.lint: node --check ./scripts/serve.mjs && node --check ./scripts/verify-render.mjs && node --check ./scripts/verify-terrain.mjs && node --check ./scripts/verify-combat-outcomes.mjs && node --check ./scripts/verify-foraging-competition.mjs && node --check ./scripts/verify-expedition-defense.mjs && node --check ./scripts/verify-balance.mjs && node --check ./scripts/asset-audit.mjs
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint
scripts.test:local: npm run check && npm run test && npm run eval:smoke
scripts.ci:quick: npm run check && npm run test && npm run asset:audit && npm run eval:smoke:ci
scripts.eval:smoke: npm run build:test && playwright test tests/playwright/quick.spec.ts --project=desktop-chromium --workers=1
scripts.eval:smoke:ci: npm run build:test && playwright test tests/playwright/quick.spec.ts
scripts.eval:e2e: npm run build:test && playwright test tests/playwright/smoke.spec.ts tests/playwright/vision-resize.spec.ts
scripts.eval:save: npm run build:test && playwright test tests/playwright/save-load.spec.ts
scripts.eval:regression: npm run build:test && playwright test tests/playwright/smoke.spec.ts tests/playwright/vision-resize.spec.ts tests/playwright/save-load.spec.ts
